q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.write_bytes(request.body), a filesystem write that constitutes an irreversible side effect and could write to arbitrary paths due to traversal

mock_guidance.target: Mock the pathlib.Path.write_bytes method on the target object
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the full resolved path of target (to detect traversal like ../) and the content from request.body
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Record the call arguments without performing any disk I/O; optionally raise no exception to let execution continue to the return statement
notes: The function returns JsonResponse containing str(target), so mocking write_bytes allows verifying both the dangerous path argument and the return value in one test.
Ensure the mock captures the Path object before write_bytes is called so traversal sequences in name (e.g., '../../etc/passwd') are observable.
